_patch_meta.description: VCB-019 Verse Context: 79 terms across Reg 173-177. Corrected filter discipline applied (filter-drift discovery 2026-04-04). 5 flags revised from AVF: DF-001 H5704, DF-003 H2939, DF-004 H2953, DF-009 H0370, DF-012 H4635. 7 flags confirmed AVF: DF-002 H2445, DF-005 H0176B, DF-006 H5460, DF-007 H5481, DF-008 H5657, DF-010 H0371, DF-011 H4634. Data notes: H7812 Pro 12:25 set aside as anomalous — Claude Code to verify sha.chah mapping. H5648 1Ch 28:9 ownership — Claude Code to confirm mti_term_id. H2940 and H7922 have header/actual verse count discrepancies — classified from actual verse records in extract.
